headline: 3 States Vote Amid $10M Crypto PAC Influence

article.title: New York, Maryland and Utah to hold primaries with crypto PAC money hanging over voters
article.summary: Crypto-backed PACs disclosed spending more than $8 million on media to support candidates in three US states, as some Maryland Democrats have called on one candidate to reject “outside spending from crypto billionaires.”

headline: Solana Dominates 95% Tokenized Equity Market Share

article.title: Solana grabs 95% of tokenized equity as traders debate if SOL bottom is in
article.summary: Solana captured 95% of tokenized equity volumes as analysts debate whether $60 was the bottom for SOL.

headline: $100bn Oil Deal Boosts Tehran Amid US Talks

article.title: Iran Oil Waiver Offers Lifeline to Tehran as Talks Proceed
article.summary: The US issued a 60-day license allowing Iran to sell oil on the international market, giving Tehran an economic lifeline as the two adversaries continued talks for a permanent peace deal.

headline: MicroStrategy Buys $34.9M Bitcoin Amid Market Volatility

article.title: Michael Saylor’s Strategy Buys $34.9 Million of Bitcoin Using Common Stock
article.summary: Michael Saylor’s Strategy Inc. bought $39.4 million of Bitcoin, leaning again on its common stock to fund purchases of the cryptocurrency for a third consecutive week despite earlier pledges to pivot to perpetual preferred shares.

headline: Crypto Sector Backs $1B Tax Reform Bill

article.title: Crypto Industry Unites Behind Bill to Fix Tax Rules for Miners and Stakers
article.summary:
Bitcoin Magazine

Crypto Industry Unites Behind Bill to Fix Tax Rules for Miners and Stakers
U.S. crypto groups are urging Congress to pass H.R. 9175, which would let miners and stakers defer taxes until assets are sold instead of taxing rewards at receipt.

headline: $10M Ethereum Lab Launches with Key Backers Onboard

article.title: BitMine, Sharplink, Joe Lubin Back New Ethereum Research and Development Lab
article.summary: Some of Ethereum's largest holders are coming together to fund a new research and development lab aimed at boosting the network and ETH.

headline: Trump Boosts $1B Quantum Push Amid Bitcoin Risk

article.title: Trump Orders Acceleration of Quantum Readiness as Bitcoin Faces Coming Risk
article.summary: President Donald Trump signed two executive orders aimed at expanding U.S. quantum computing capabilities and speeding the transition to quantum-resistant encryption.

headline: Solmate Stakeholder Sues Board for $1B Breach

article.title: Solana treasury firm Solmate’s largest stakeholder sues board for self-dealing, fiduciary breaches
article.summary: Board members Ron Sade and Keren Maimon personally bought about 2.298 million SLMT shares at $4.97, diluting shareholders ~20%.

headline: $1M Backing for Ethlabs Boosts Ethereum Growth

article.title: Bitmine, SharpLink and Joe Lubin back Ethlabs nonprofit to advance Ethereum’s ‘next phase’ of growth
article.summary: Ethlabs, backed by Joe Lubin and the two largest ETH DATs, Bitmine and SharpLink, will focus on institutional adoption.

headline: UK Stocks Rally on $1.5B Burnham Bump Expectation

article.summary: Outgoing Greater Manchester mayor gears up for talks with civil service as he prepares to enter Number 10 within weeks

headline: UK Leadership Chaos Sparks 2% Pound Drop

article.title: The revolving door of Downing Street
